Package org.eventb.internal.core.pom

  • Field Details

    • DEBUG

      public static boolean DEBUG
      Flag for the POM debug trace

    • PERF_PROOFREUSE

      public static boolean PERF_PROOFREUSE
      Flag for the POM proof reuse performance trace

    • totalRuns

      private static int totalRuns
      Variable that records the number of runs of the POM during the entire session.

      Note: This value is only updated if the PERF_PROOFREUSE flag is set to true.

    • manager

      private static final IProofManager manager

  • Constructor Details

    • AutoPOM

      public AutoPOM()

  • Method Details

    • run

      public boolean run(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor pm) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IAutomaticTool
      Runs the tool that updates a file (or a set of files). The tool must delete all markers from the input file(s) from which file is (directly) derived.
      Specified by:
      run in interface IAutomaticTool
      Parameters:
      source - The source node from which the target node was created by an extractor, or null if this is unknown
      target - The file to be updated
      pm - The progress monitor
      Returns:
      True if file has changed, false otherwise
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - If some internal problem occurred

    • tryMakeConsistent

      public static void tryMakeConsistent(IProofComponent pc)

    • clean

      public void clean(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IAutomaticTool
      A tool responsible for creating a file is also responsible for cleaning it. Cleaning occurs on two occasions:
      • when a project is explicitly selected for cleaning (e.g. in the Eclipse project menu)
      • when a file was deleted all files that can be reached by tool dependencies are cleaned
      Specified by:
      clean in interface IAutomaticTool
      Parameters:
      source - The source node from which the target node was created by an extractor, or null if this is unknown
      target - to be cleaned
      monitor - The progress monitor
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • extract

      public void extract(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, IGraph graph, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IExtractor
      Extracts dependency information from a file.
      Specified by:
      extract in interface IExtractor
      Parameters:
      source - the file to be extracted
      graph - the dependency graph to update
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem

    • getPSRoot

      private static IPSRoot getPSRoot(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile poResource)

    • createFreshProofFile

      private void createFreshProofFile(IProofComponent pc, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor pm) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
